member.name: T:Delayer
member.summary: Provides a delay mechanism for executing actions after a given time. Uses the provided ExecutorService for scheduling.

member.name: M:Delayer.DelayAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Schedules an action to run after the specified delay.
member.param: Time to wait before executing the action.

member.name: M:Delayer.DelayAsync(System.TimeSpan,System.Action)
member.summary: Schedules an action to run after the specified delay.
member.param: Time to wait before executing the action.

member.name: M:Delayer.DelayAsync``1(System.TimeSpan,System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Schedules a function returning a value after a delay.
